install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y wget && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

python -c "import torchvision; d10=torchvision.datasets.CIFAR10('/data/cifar', train=True); d100=torchvision.datasets.CIFAR100('/data/cifar', train=True); dfm=torchvision.datasets.FashionMNIST('/data/fmnist', train=True); print(f'CIFAR-10: {len(d10)}, CIFAR-100: {len(d100)}, FashionMNIST: {len(dfm)}')"

data_deps.name: pytorch-vision-data
data_deps.description: CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and FashionMNIST datasets for pytorch-vision tasks
